whitney.note: no successful sub-band ACF fit (sub-bands too narrow); pipeline defaulted to lorentzian_component

mahi.note: unfittable: 54 time bins, burst at frame edge (peak@1) -> insufficient off-pulse for baseline/noise; pipeline NumbaTypeError on degenerate masked frame

_meta.method: npy_to_npz (flip+slice, no de-ripple; casey roundtrip byte-identical) + casey_chime.yaml-mirror config (full 400-800 MHz, num_subbands=4, fit_lagrange=1.0, poly-1 baseline, self-noise template on); per-burst on/off windows from nan-aware burst profile
_meta.casey_documented: FAIL (README; power-law full alpha=8.0 chi=17.2, hi-band alpha=7.96 chi=5.25; ~117kHz peak was self-noise, rejected)
_meta.conclusion: all 5 CHIME up-channelized sightlines FAIL the fit-validation contract; CHIME-band Dnu_d not contract-recoverable; two-screen Dnu(nu) rests on DSA band (resolved at 30.5 kHz) + CHIME upper limits consistent with the NE2025 Galactic floor
